stemHtml:
Refer to figure or use CAP 698 figure 3.1.

Determine the ground roll and take off distance for a Multi engine piston aeroplane, given:

Outside air temperature: 22°C
Pressure altitude: 4000 ft
Take off mass: 4250 lb
Wind: 5 kt tailwind

options.a: Ground roll: 2400 ft; take off distance: 2500 ft
options.b: Ground roll: 1700 ft; take off distance: 2050 ft
options.c: Ground roll: 2100 ft; take off distance: 2500 ft
options.d: Ground roll: 1350 ft; take off distance: 1650 ft
